item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: Happy Shrove Tuesday—we’re having free pancakes this morning! Teachers, please note the schedule sent to you by email, and the first classes on the list can come down to the atrium immediately after announcements.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron:
item.description: Could Heidi Backs, Sophia Smith, Emma Pineo, Elena Kwok, Madison Burt, Jouri H and any other Europe team member who did not pick up their 50/50 tickets please see Mme Perron following announcements in Room 125.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval :
item.description: the Weight Room is open daily at lunch from 10:40–11:20. Thursdays are reserved for female students only. Plus, the weight room is also open Tuesday after school. Come Join Mrs. Longval for a strength, cardio or stretch session.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Reminding all students who are signed up for the CrossFit Team - our 1st practice is today afterschool. Pleae submit signed forms before our workout.
